meta.title: Memberships | Essentia Social Wellness Club
meta.description: Exclusive membership plans at Essentia giving you full access to our longevity center, wellness protocols, and community in Tenerife.

hero.heading: Membership
hero.body: Every membership includes full access to the Essentia space. What changes is the depth of your protocols, the priority of your booking, and the closeness of your care.

selector.heading: Choose your membership.
selector.subheading: Select a tier to see what's included.
selector.successBody: Your membership is confirmed. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.

essential.name: Essential
essential.description: Full access to all wellness facilities, group sessions, and community events. The complete Essentia experience.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Everything in Essential, plus priority booking, personalized wellness protocols, and monthly medical consultations.

founder.name: Founder
founder.description: Full ecosystem access with a dedicated health advisor, unlimited guest privileges, and founding member status.

comparison.heading: What's included.
comparison.subheading: A clear look at what each tier gives you.

items.question: How do I become a member?
items.answer: Start by getting in touch through our contact page or booking form. Our team will walk you through the tiers, answer your questions, and arrange a tour of the space before you commit.

items.question: Can I try Essentia before joining?
items.answer: Yes. We offer introductory visits for prospective members. Contact us to schedule a guided tour and a complimentary session so you can experience the space first-hand.

items.question: How does billing work?
items.answer: Memberships are billed monthly. You can cancel at any time with 30 days written notice.

items.question: Can I cancel or pause my membership?
items.answer: You may cancel your membership with 30 days written notice. Pauses may be available in certain circumstances — speak to our team.

items.question: What is the difference between Essential and Premium in practice?
items.answer: Essential gives you full access to all shared facilities and group sessions. Premium adds the ability to book specific equipment slots ahead of time, a personalised wellness protocol reviewed monthly, and access to medical consultations with our clinical team.

items.question: Who is the Founder membership for?
items.answer: Founder is designed for those who want a truly bespoke longevity experience. You get a dedicated health advisor who coordinates all your protocols, unlimited guest access, and seats at invitation-only events. It is limited to a small number of members.

cta.heading: Ready to begin?
cta.body: Our team will help you choose the right tier and answer any questions before you commit to anything.
